source_commit: acc0da0 task6: add v113 JTAG IR mapping probe for init-status-only bitstream

build.status_notes: Programmed with openFPGALoader using --skip-load-bridge on Board A (2026-05-06) and confirmed device id: 0x23751093 (xc7k480t).
Invalid JTAG_CHAIN value rejected by yosys/nextpnr pipeline. Error: Allowed values are 1-4.

interpretation: Chain-1 init-status-only probe confirms the same no-progress failure mode on Board A (`PROBE_RESET`, PLL and init not stable). Chain-0 is not a valid implementation variant and cannot be built due JTAG chain bounds.
next_action: Keep JTAG chain at 1 and treat `task6...init-status-only` as reproducer for control-path failure. Next step should run explicit IR-mapping diagnostics against this exact build before further DDR logic changes.
